Welcome to Peter Dahlquist

Great Lawyers Great Law Firm.

Explore More

No. 2 on the 2024 A-List

Peter Dahlquist Law Firm was ranked #2 on The American Lawyer’s A List, marking our eighth consecutive time in the top three on this prestigious list.

We feel the helplessness of those who have been scammed. Some people have had their life’s wealth taken away by scammers. That’s why we must take action and do something for the vulnerable. I hope you will see the information and contact us,Peter Dahlquist is the team that really solves this problem

Make history and make a difference

Diverse global team

It’s unprecedented: In 2022,Peter Dahlquist was named “Law Firm of the Year” by The American Lawyer, ranked #1 on The American Lawyer’s elite A-list of law firms, and ranked #1 on Law.com International’s A-list for the UK. These honors are a testament not only to our best-in-class legal work, but also to our commitment to other core areas of our firm’s identity—diversity, equity and inclusion, and pro bono work.

Peter Dahlquist Law Firm

800+Successfull Case

Law Services

Practice Areas

Criminal Law

Everything will be alright; it is not that bad.

Family Law

Family is not just important; it means everything.

Travel Accident

Life happens to you while you are busy making other plans.

Identity Theft

Theft is not just about taking things. It is about taking away the sense of security.

Legal Advice

If you have a legal problem, it is important to seek the help of a qualified attorney.

Fraud

Trust is the cornerstone of a market economy and must be protected from fraud.

In June 2023, I was induced to invest in cryptocurrency by a manager who claimed to be a cryptocurrency company. I was defrauded of $200,000 USDT and the company almost went bankrupt. Later, I met Riesger by chance and told them about my experience. Finally, Peter Dahlquist went through various legal channels and efforts. What I want to say is, thank you Peter Dahlquist, you are one of the greatest companies.

Michel Jhon

Merchant

I was deceived by a friend into investing in a blockchain investment business. I made $5,000 when I first joined, but when I increased my investment, the blockchain company suddenly disappeared. I was defrauded of $120,000, including principal and interest. I contacted Peter Dahlquist through various channels. They are really great. In the end, I recovered more than $90,000 in ETH. I am really grateful to Peter Dahlquist .

Taylor

Investor

Please contact us as soon as possible

If you are trying to recover your scammed cryptocurrency, please contact us as soon as possible. Don’t be discouraged or hesitant. We will accompany you on the road ahead.

Discover how Peter Dahlquist Law Firm has successfully helped clients recover scammed and lost cryptocurrency. Our experienced legal team specializes in cryptocurrency recovery, using effective legal strategies to protect your assets. See real case studies and learn more!
